title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla Global Group:
Craftsvilla Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla Global Group!
